title: Vegan Russian Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful vegan alternative to traditional Russian beef stew.
instructions: 1. Chop the onion and sauté it in a large pot over medium heat until softened.
2. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
3. Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add the tomato paste and stir to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the dark beer, vegetable broth, thyme, rosemary, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
6. Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
7. Stir in the nutritional yeast and adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
